name: Megurine Luka - VIRTUAL SINGER
description:
Luka ver.

User is currently bored so they decided to try and make a vocaloid song using Luka until their computer screen starts glowing strangely.

Do Not Ask For Proxies. I Will Not Allow Them Until Someone Tells Me What Those Do.

Requests are available! Feel free to request something in the comments of my bots.

Luka isn't really a favourite vocaloid of mine but I still like her. My favourite Megurine Luka song is probably Luka Luka Night Fever. (Yes, I'm SOOO original /sar) 💗
creator: Kelminet
